name: [BUG-ANA-003] TC-ANA-003 — CORS Access-Control-Allow-Methods advertises POST/DELETE but all return 405
description:
**[BUG-ANA-003]**

The analytics API response headers include:
`Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,PATCH,OPTIONS`

But every method except GET and OPTIONS returns 405 Method Not Allowed.

**Expected:** `Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, OPTIONS` — only the methods the endpoint actually supports.

**Impact:** CORS-aware browsers see POST/DELETE as "allowed" and may not pre-flight; the subsequent request is then rejected by the server with 405. This is confusing and can break CORS-aware HTTP clients that rely on the advertised methods list.
descriptionHtml:
[BUG-ANA-003]

The analytics API response headers include:
Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,PATCH,OPTIONS

But every method except GET and OPTIONS returns 405 Method Not Allowed.

Expected: Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, OPTIONS — only the methods the endpoint actually supports.

Impact: CORS-aware browsers see POST/DELETE as "allowed" and may not pre-flight; the subsequent request is then rejected by the server with 405. This is confusing and can break CORS-aware HTTP clients that rely on the advertised methods list.
statusMessage:
Error: [BUG-ANA-003] CORS must not advertise POST when it returns 405

expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Received: true

The analytics API response headers include:
`Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,PATCH,OPTIONS`

But every method except GET and OPTIONS returns 405 Method Not Allowed.

**Expected:** `Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, OPTIONS` — only the methods the endpoint actually supports.
